title: Repair Parallel Perfect Motion
objective: Repair a two-voice passage that contains parallel perfect fifths.
prompt: Change the fewest notes needed to remove evaluator errors while preserving strict MidGrid syntax and the lower voice contour.
success_criteria: Evaluator initially reports parallel_perfect for the seed or attempt.
Corrected version keeps V1 unchanged unless a smaller repair is impossible.
Corrected version has no evaluator error issues.
